prompt: Make the bass line alternate between long whole notes and quick 16th note runs.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 chorus 4
